lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਠਾ ਮਨੂਆ ਠਾਹਹਿ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: tthatthaa manooaa tthaaheh naahee |
lines.english: T'HAT'HA: Those who have abandoned all else,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸਗਲ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਏਕਹਿ ਲਪਟਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jo sagal tiaag ekeh lapattaahee |
lines.english: and who cling to the One Lord alone, do not make trouble for anyone's mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਹਕਿ ਠਹਕਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਸੰਗਿ ਮੂਏ ॥
lines.translit: tthehak tthehak maaeaa sang mooe |
lines.english: Those who are totally absorbed and preoccupied with Maya are dead;

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਆ ਕੈ ਕੁਸਲ ਨ ਕਤਹੂ ਹੂਏ ॥
lines.translit: auaa kai kusal na katahoo hooe |
lines.english: they do not find happiness anywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਾਂਢਿ ਪਰੀ ਸੰਤਹ ਸੰਗਿ ਬਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: tthaandt paree santah sang basiaa |
lines.english: One who dwells in the Society of the Saints finds a great peace;

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਤਹਾ ਜੀਅ ਰਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam tahaa jeea rasiaa |
lines.english: the Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam becomes sweet to his soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਾਕੁਰ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਜੋ ਜਨੁ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: tthaakur apune jo jan bhaaeaa |
lines.english: That humble being, who is pleasing to his Lord and Master

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਉਆ ਕਾ ਮਨੁ ਸੀਤਲਾਇਆ ॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: naanak uaa kaa man seetalaaeaa |28|
lines.english: - O Nanak, his mind is cooled and soothed. ||28||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡੰਡਉਤਿ ਬੰਦਨ ਅਨਿਕ ਬਾਰ ਸਰਬ ਕਲਾ ਸਮਰਥ ॥
lines.translit: ddanddaut bandan anik baar sarab kalaa samarath |
lines.english: I bow down, and fall to the ground in humble adoration, countless times, to the All-powerful Lord, who possesses all powers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡੋਲਨ ਤੇ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਨਾਨਕ ਦੇ ਕਰਿ ਹਥ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ddolan te raakhahu prabhoo naanak de kar hath |1|
lines.english: Please protect me, and save me from wandering, God. Reach out and give Nanak Your Hand. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਆ ਡੇਰਾ ਕਾ ਸੰਜਮੋ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: auaa dderaa kaa sanjamo gur kai sabad pachhaan |
lines.english: You shall come to realize the way to that place, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਡਾ ਡੇਰਾ ਇਹੁ ਨਹੀ ਜਹ ਡੇਰਾ ਤਹ ਜਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: ddaddaa dderaa ihu nahee jeh dderaa teh jaan |
lines.english: DADDA: This is not your true place; you must know where that place really is.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਆ ਡੇਰਾ ਕਉ ਸ੍ਰਮੁ ਕਰਿ ਘਾਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: eaa dderaa kau sram kar ghaalai |
lines.english: This place, here, is established by hard work,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਾ ਤਸੂ ਨਹੀ ਸੰਗਿ ਚਾਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kaa tasoo nahee sang chaalai |
lines.english: but not one iota of this shall go there with you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਆ ਡੇਰਾ ਕੀ ਸੋ ਮਿਤਿ ਜਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: auaa dderaa kee so mit jaanai |
lines.english: The value of that place beyond is known only to those,

lines.gurmukhi: ਡੇਰਾ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਾਧਸੰਗ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dderaa nihachal sach saadhasang paaeaa |
lines.english: That permanent and true place is obtained in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਉ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਭਗਵਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kau drisatt pooran bhagavaanai |
lines.english: upon whom the Perfect Lord God casts His Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇ ਜਨ ਨਹ ਡੋਲਾਇਆ ॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: naanak te jan neh ddolaaeaa |29|
lines.english: O Nanak, those humble beings do not waver or wander. ||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਉਬਰੇ ਜਪਿ ਹਰੀ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਸਨਬੰਧ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak ubare jap haree saadhasang sanabandh |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who join the Saadh Sangat and meditate on the Lord are saved. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਢਾਹਨ ਲਾਗੇ ਧਰਮ ਰਾਇ ਕਿਨਹਿ ਨ ਘਾਲਿਓ ਬੰਧ ॥
lines.translit: dtaahan laage dharam raae kineh na ghaalio bandh |
lines.english: When the Righteous Judge of Dharma begins to destroy someone, no one can place any obstacle in His Way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗਿ ਤੁਹਾਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਬਸੈ ਬਨੁ ਬਨੁ ਕਹਾ ਫਿਰਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sang tuhaarai prabh basai ban ban kahaa firaeh |
lines.english: God is with you, so why do you wander around from forest to forest?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਢਢਾ ਢੂਢਤ ਕਹ ਫਿਰਹੁ ਢੂਢਨੁ ਇਆ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: dtadtaa dtoodtat keh firahu dtoodtan eaa man maeh |
lines.english: DHADHA: Where are you going, wandering and searching? Search instead within your own mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਹੁ ਸਹਜੇ ਬਸਹੁ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਨਿਹਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: sukh paavahu sahaje basahu darasan dekh nihaal |
lines.english: You shall find peace, and abide in intuitive bliss; gazing upon the Blessed Vision of God's Darshan, you shall be delighted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਢੇਰੀ ਢਾਹਹੁ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਅਹੰਬੁਧਿ ਬਿਕਰਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: dteree dtaahahu saadhasang ahanbudh bikaraal |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, tear down the mound of your frightful, egotistical pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਮਗਨ ਲਪਟਤ ਰਹੈ ਹਉ ਹਉ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: moh magan lapattat rahai hau hau aavai jaae |
lines.english: One who is intoxicated by emotional attachment, entangled in egotism, selfishness and conceit, shall continue coming and going in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਢੇਰੀ ਜਾਮੈ ਜਮਿ ਮਰੈ ਗਰਭ ਜੋਨਿ ਦੁਖ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dteree jaamai jam marai garabh jon dukh paae |
lines.english: One who has such a mound as this, dies and suffers the pain of reincarnation through the womb.

lines.gurmukhi: ਢਹਤ ਢਹਤ ਅਬ ਢਹਿ ਪਰੇ ਸਾਧ ਜਨਾ ਸਰਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dtehat dtehat ab dteh pare saadh janaa saranaae |
lines.english: Slowly and steadily, I have now surrendered to the Holy Saints; I have come to their Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਕੇ ਫਾਹੇ ਕਾਟਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਲੀਏ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: dukh ke faahe kaattiaa naanak lee samaae |30|
lines.english: God has cut away the noose of my pain; O Nanak, He has merged me into Himself. ||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਸਾਧੂ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਭਜਨੁ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਨੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: jeh saadhoo gobid bhajan keeratan naanak neet |
lines.english: Where the Holy people constantly vibrate the Kirtan of the Praises of the Lord of the Universe, O Nanak

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਣਾ ਹਉ ਣਾ ਤੂੰ ਣਹ ਛੁਟਹਿ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਨ ਜਾਈਅਹੁ ਦੂਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naa hau naa toon neh chhutteh nikatt na jaaeeahu doot |1|
lines.english: - the Righteous Judge says, "Do not approach that place, O Messenger of Death, or else neither you nor I shall escape!" ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਅਨ ਸਿਉ ਲਰਿ ਮਰੈ ਸੋ ਸੋਭਾ ਦੂ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: haumai an siau lar marai so sobhaa doo hoe |
lines.english: One who dies, while fighting against egotism and alienation, becomes sublime and beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਣਾਣਾ ਰਣ ਤੇ ਸੀਝੀਐ ਆਤਮ ਜੀਤੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanaa ran te seejheeai aatam jeetai koe |
lines.english: NANNA: One who conquers his own soul, wins the battle of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੂਆ ਜੀਤੈ ਹਰਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਿਹ ਸੂਰਤਣ ਵੇਸ ॥
lines.translit: manooaa jeetai har milai tih sooratan ves |
lines.english: He conquers his mind, and meets the Lord; he is dressed in robes of honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਣੀ ਮਿਟਾਇ ਜੀਵਤ ਮਰੈ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਉਪਦੇਸ ॥
lines.translit: manee mittaae jeevat marai gur poore upades |
lines.english: One who eradicates his ego, remains dead while yet alive, through the Teachings of the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਣਾ ਕੋ ਜਾਣੈ ਆਪਣੋ ਏਕਹਿ ਟੇਕ ਅਧਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: naa ko jaanai aapano ekeh ttek adhaar |
lines.english: He does not claim anything as his own; the One Lord is his Anchor and Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇਣ ਸਗਲ ਇਆ ਮਨੁ ਕਰੈ ਏਊ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: ren sagal eaa man karai eaoo karam kamaae |
lines.english: He makes his mind the dust of all; such is the karma of the deeds he does.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੈਣਿ ਦਿਣਸੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਰਹੈ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: rain dinas simarat rahai so prabh purakh apaar |
lines.english: Night and day, he continually contemplates the Almighty, Infinite Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੈ ਬੂਝੈ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਪਾਇ ॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: hukamai boojhai sadaa sukh naanak likhiaa paae |31|
lines.english: Understanding the Hukam of the Lord's Command, he attains everlasting peace. O Nanak, such is his pre-ordained destiny. ||31||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭ੍ਰਮ ਭਉ ਕਾਟੀਐ ਚੂਕੈ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਜੋਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak bhram bhau kaatteeai chookai jam kee joh |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, my doubts and fears have been dispelled, and the Messenger of Death does not see me any longer. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਅਰਪਉ ਤਿਸੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ ਮੋਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: tan man dhan arpau tisai prabhoo milaavai mohi |
lines.english: I offer my body, mind and wealth to anyone who can unite me with God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਲ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਮਨ ਬਾਛਤੇ ਤਪਤਿ ਤੁਹਾਰੀ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: fal paaveh man baachhate tapat tuhaaree jaae |
lines.english: You shall obtain the fruits of your mind's desires, and your burning thirst shall be quenched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਤਾ ਤਾ ਸਿਉ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਕਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਿ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tataa taa siau preet kar gun nidh gobid raae |
lines.english: TATTA: Embrace love for the Treasure of Excellence, the Sovereign Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:
